name: USS Ault (DD 698)
events: 10 Jul 1944 USS Ault (Cdr. Joseph Caldwell Wylie, Jr.) depart from New York for shakedown and training in the Caribbean. When her training is completed she returns to New York.
6 Sep 1944 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) departed from New York bound for Trinidad. She then proceeded to the Pacific through the Panama Canal.
29 Sep 1944 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
18 Dec 1944 After training USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) departed from Pearl Harbor for the western Pacific.
24 Dec 1944 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) arrived at Eniwetok for a fuelling stop. She departed from again the same day.
28 Dec 1944 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) arrived at Ulithi.
30 Dec 1944 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) departed Ulithi as part of the screen of TG 38.2.
25 Jan 1945 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) arrived back at Ulithi.
10 Feb 1945 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) departed Ulithi as part of the screen of TG 58.3.
4 Mar 1945 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) arrived back at Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) departed Ulithi as part of the screen of TG 58.3.
1 Jun 1945 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) enters San Pedro Bay.
1 Jul 1945 USS Ault (Cdr. J.C. Wylie, Jr.) departed from San Pedro Bay as part of TF 38.
2 Sep 1945 USS Ault (Cmdr David Sheldon Edwards, Jr.) enters Tokyo Bay.
